title: RoleResult
description: Envelope-composed Role subprocess output artifact. This encodes DGOS-A-0001's canonical Role output and the DGOS-A-0002 RoleResult handoff with machine-readable status, confidence, missing context, review, and artifact refs.
$comment: DGOS-A-0001 defines Role outputs as produced, skipped, blocked, or needs_human with confidence, missing_context, human_review_required, source_artifacts, output_artifacts, and optional skip_reason. DGOS-A-0002 also describes runner failure status; in this schema runner failure is represented by the shared envelope diagnostics.status/errors and process exit code, while payload.status remains the ADR-1/DecisionVerdict-compatible Role-result status set.

invocation_id.description: REQUIRED string. Correlation id from the matching RoleInvocation.

role_id.description: REQUIRED string. Stable Role identity that produced this result.

role_version.description: REQUIRED string. Version of the role prompt, profile, and artifact contract.

missing_context.description: REQUIRED array. Machine-readable context the Role needed but did not have.

human_review_required.description: REQUIRED boolean. Daimyo-compatible review gate flag for RoleResult to DecisionVerdict projection.

source_artifacts.description: REQUIRED array. Source artifacts the Role actually consumed or relied on.

output_artifacts.description: REQUIRED array. Output artifacts produced, skipped, blocked, or proposed by this Role result.

decision_verdict.description: OPTIONAL object. Decision-channel projection when this RoleResult is emitted by a DecisionProvider adapter; shape is the DGOS-T-0017 DecisionVerdict schema.

proposed_artifact_patches.description: OPTIONAL array. Patches proposed when the Role does not own the target artifact.

roleResultStatus.title: RoleResultStatus
roleResultStatus.description: ADR-1 canonical Role-result status, aligned with daimyo's DecisionVerdict adapter mapping.

roleSkipReason.title: RoleSkipReason
roleSkipReason.description: OPTIONAL object. Machine-readable reason for status=skipped; consumers must not parse prose.

code.description: REQUIRED string. Stable skip reason code.

category.description: REQUIRED string. Skip category for routing and metrics.

proposedArtifactPatch.title: ProposedArtifactPatch
proposedArtifactPatch.description: Machine-readable proposed artifact patch emitted when the Role does not own the target artifact.

roleUsage.title: RoleUsage
roleUsage.description: OPTIONAL object. Cost estimate or actual usage when available.

estimated_cost_usd.description: OPTIONAL number. Estimated invocation cost in USD.

actual_cost_usd.description: OPTIONAL number. Actual invocation cost in USD when known.

input_tokens.description: OPTIONAL integer. Input tokens consumed when known.

output_tokens.description: OPTIONAL integer. Output tokens consumed when known.

model_id.description: OPTIONAL string. Model/provider identity when available.

retryRecommendation.title: RetryRecommendation
retryRecommendation.description: OPTIONAL object. Machine-readable retry guidance from the Role runner.

recommended.description: REQUIRED boolean. Whether the caller should retry this Role invocation.

reason_codes.description: OPTIONAL array. Machine-readable reasons for the retry recommendation.

after_ms.description: OPTIONAL integer. Minimum delay before retry.

roleTraceResult.title: RoleTraceResult
roleTraceResult.description: REQUIRED object. Durable trace records emitted by the Role runner.

trace_refs.description: REQUIRED array. Trace artifacts, logs, stdout/stderr captures, or external trace ids.

trace_id.description: OPTIONAL string. Stable trace id allocated by the caller or runner.

jsonObject.title: RoleResultJsonObject
jsonObject.description: Structured JSON object; consumers must not parse prose from it.
